game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Zombie Night Terror**: Zombie Night Terror is a real-time strategy puzzle game where players indirectly control a zombie horde to infect humans and overcome environmental obstacles across 2D pixel-art levels. Players issue commands by tapping on individual zombies or dragging to select multiple, then tapping ability icons from a UI bar to activate specific mutations like "Overlord" to guide movement, "Exploder" to destroy weak walls, or "Runner" for increased speed. Each mutation costs a specific amount of "DNA points," a resource gained by converting humans or completing level objectives, and has a cooldown before reuse. The core loop involves strategically using mutations to navigate levels, convert all 10-20 humans per stage into new zombies to grow the horde, and destroy destructible environmental elements to create new paths. A level is won when all humans are infected or a specific objective is met, while failure occurs if the entire zombie horde is eliminated by human defenses or environmental hazards.
game_info.description: Command a zombie horde to infect all humans across challenging 2D side-scrolling levels. Use DNA points to activate powerful mutations like Overlord (guide zombies), Exploder (destroy walls), and Runner (boost speed). Convert humans to grow your horde, destroy obstacles to create paths, and overcome defensive hazards. Win by infecting all humans, but lose if your entire horde is eliminated. Strategic mutation usage and careful planning are key to spreading the infection!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Pan camera left/right to view the level
Space: Select/deselect zombie under cursor (shown by selector indicator)
Z: Cycle through available mutations (Overlord, Exploder, Runner)
Shift: Activate selected mutation on selected zombie (costs DNA points)
Enter: Start game from start screen
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart and return to start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic zombie movement and human interaction mechanics. Validates that zombies can walk, fall with gravity, and convert humans on contact. Ensures DNA points are awarded for conversions.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Allows zombies to naturally wander and interact with the environment. Monitors zombie-human collisions and DNA point accumulation. Tests basic physics like walking and falling.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Zombies should move autonomously, convert humans on contact, and award DNA points. Basic movement and collision detection should work correctly. Test passes when several humans are converted.

TEST_1.expected: Zombies should move autonomously, convert humans on contact, and award DNA points. Basic movement and collision detection should work correctly. Test passes when several humans are converted.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the optimal strategy to win the game by efficiently using all three mutations. Validates that strategic mutation usage leads to victory by converting all humans.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Uses Overlord mutation to guide zombies toward humans and objectives. Deploys Exploder strategically to destroy walls blocking access to humans. Uses Runner to accelerate zombie movement when needed. Manages DNA resources carefully to maximize mutation effectiveness.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: All humans should be converted to zombies through strategic mutation usage. The test should achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state. DNA management should enable continuous mutation deployment without resource starvation.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests random exploration and mutation usage. Validates that random actions don't cause crashes and the game handles unpredictable inputs gracefully.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Randomly selects zombies and applies random mutations. Moves camera randomly. Tests edge cases and unexpected input sequences.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Game should remain stable under random inputs. No crashes or visual glitches. Eventually may win or lose based on random chance, but system integrity is maintained.
